name: projecte-aura
description: Projecte Aura Cloud v5.3 amb IA conversacional híbrida Llama/GPT arrelada en D1, pont explícit amb Sergi Avatar, memòria persistent, backups verificables i accés privat.

scripts.check: node --check aura_core.js && node --check 'functions/_lib/aura_ai.js' && node --check 'functions/api/[[path]].js' && node --check workers/aura_backup_worker.js
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:security && npm run test:infrastructure && npm run test:ui && npm run test:conversation && npm run test:genome && npm run test:evolution && npm run test:body && npm run test:knowledge && npm run test:reflection
scripts.prepare:pages: rm -rf .deploy/projecte-aura && mkdir -p .deploy/projecte-aura && cp index.html aura_core.js aura_style.css aura_identity.jpg aura_logo.jpg _headers _redirects .deploy/projecte-aura/
scripts.dev:pages: npm run prepare:pages && wrangler pages dev .deploy/projecte-aura --port=8788
scripts.deploy: npm run prepare:pages && wrangler pages deploy .deploy/projecte-aura --project-name=projecte-aura --branch=main
